news.paragraph: Technology stocks are showing upward momentum in pre-market trading, even as broader equity futures and exchange-traded funds remain mixed. The upcoming US-China meeting acts as a potential macro catalyst that could drive volatility. Traders should consider this sector-specific strength alongside the broader geopolitical uncertainty.
headlines: Leading And Lagging Sectors For May 13, 2026
Sector Update: Tech Stocks Rise Pre-Bell Wednesday
Exchange-Traded Funds, Equity Futures Mixed Pre-Bell Wednesday Ahead of US-China Meeting
Wegovy® pill delivered 21.6% weight loss in early responders and doubled mobility improvement, according to new Novo Nordisk data at ECO2026
